name: Herb Ripper - XL Grinder Maintenance Kit
summary: Extend the lifespan and performance of your Herb Ripper XL Grinder with this complete maintenance kit.
description: Extend the lifespan and performance of your Herb Ripper XL Grinder with this complete maintenance kit. Purpose-built for the XL model, it provides all essential replacement components and lubrication tools needed to keep the grinder operating smoothly and consistently over time. This kit is designed exclusively for the Herb Ripper XL Grinder. For the standard-size model, please refer to our regular Herb Ripper Maintenance Kit. A small upgrade that makes every session more even.
